<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Imagine\Image\ImageInterface; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Grégoire Pineau <lyrixx@lyrixx.info> * * @internal since Symfony 7.3 */ final class ImagineCaster { public static function castImage(ImageInterface $c, array $a, Stub $stub, bool $isNested): array { $imgData = $c->get('png'); if (\strlen($imgData) > 1 * 1000 * 1000) { $a += [ Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'image' => new ConstStub($c->getSize()), ]; } else { $a += [ Caster::PREFIX_VIRTUAL.'image' => new ImgStub($imgData, 'image/png', $c->getSize()), ]; } return $a; } }
